title: Build SDLC plugin: Phase 1-3 commands (planning, requirements, design)
closeReason: Implemented all 8 SDLC Phase 1-3 command files: sdlc-idea, sdlc-epic, sdlc-roadmap (Phase 1), sdlc-prd, sdlc-stories, sdlc-acceptance (Phase 2), sdlc-design, sdlc-arch (Phase 3). Each file follows SPEC.MD Section 8 template with Jira API integration.

title: Build SDLC plugin: Phase 4-5 commands (development, testing)
closeReason: Created all 6 Phase 4-5 SDLC command files: sdlc-plan, sdlc-implement, sdlc-commit (Phase 4 development) and sdlc-test, sdlc-bug, sdlc-qa (Phase 5 testing). Each file follows SPEC.MD template with Jira API integration, artifact schemas, and next-step suggestions.

title: Build SDLC plugin: Phase 6-7 + utils commands (deployment, maintenance, utils)
closeReason: Created 8 SDLC slash command files for Phase 6 (sdlc-release, sdlc-deploy), Phase 7 (sdlc-retro, sdlc-monitor, sdlc-hotfix), and utilities (sdlc-status, sdlc-sync-jira, sdlc-sprint). All follow SPEC.MD prompt template structure with full Jira API integration.

title: Build SDLC plugin: Agents, settings, jira-config, and SDLCs directory scaffold
closeReason: Created 5 agent definitions (jira-connector, requirements-analyst, tech-architect, qa-engineer, release-manager), jira-config.json, and 9 SDLCs directory .gitkeep files. All committed to worktree branch.
